findings.description: Destructive operations in SKILL.md constraints need explicit realpath canonicalization — 'resolves to' is ambiguous to AI agents
findings.proposedRule: Require realpath canonicalization and parent-path validation for rm -rf in skill constraints

findings.source: platform-markers unit — eliminated sw-build adapter override
findings.description: Platform markers in core skills eliminate adapter duplication for body-only differences
findings.proposedRule: Use platform markers for body differences, reserve overrides for fundamentally different skills

findings.source: claude-code-tests unit — 3 rounds of hardening across gate-tests and PR review
findings.description: Bash test suites need EXIT traps, parser sanity checks, and git diff for source integrity
findings.proposedRule: EXIT trap, parser sanity check, git diff --exit-code for bash test scripts

findings.description: PR reviewers consistently find issues that gates miss (protocol adherence, edge cases, ambiguous wording)

findings.source: work-lifecycle unit — state cleanup design decision
findings.description: State cleanup belongs in sw-learn (not sw-ship) to preserve workDir access during learn phase
